services.title: Welding & Custom Metal Work | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Professional welding and custom metal work in San Diego. Handrails, gates, security doors, anchor bolts, and structural repairs with clear communication and honest pricing.

hero.headline: Skilled welding and custom metal work for your home.
hero.subheadline: Handrails, gates, security doors, and structural fixes — done right the first time.

services.intro: I provide high-quality welding and custom metal fabrication for homeowners who need more than basic handyman work. Whether you need a new handrail, gate repair, security door, or custom metal solutions, I bring real skill and clean execution to every job.
benefits: Real welding experience — not just basic repairs
Custom work built to fit your specific home
Clean, professional results with minimal disruption
Clear communication and honest pricing upfront
servicesIncluded: Metal fence and gate latch repairs
process: Free on-site assessment and transparent quote
Clear explanation of options before any work begins
Clean, careful work with surfaces protected
Final walkthrough so you’re completely satisfied
services.pricingNote: Most welding and custom metal jobs range from $350–$950 depending on scope and materials. I’ll always give you a clear written estimate before starting any work.

services.title: Tankless Water Heater Descaling | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Professional tankless water heater descaling and maintenance in San Diego. Restore efficiency and extend the life of your tankless system with honest pricing.

hero.headline: Tankless water heater descaling and maintenance.
hero.subheadline: Restore performance and efficiency to your tankless system.

services.intro: I provide professional tankless water heater descaling services to remove mineral buildup, restore flow and efficiency, and help extend the life of your unit. Regular descaling keeps your system running properly and can prevent costly issues later.
benefits: Restores water flow and heating efficiency
Helps prevent premature failure of the unit
Clean process with proper flushing technique
Clear explanation of maintenance recommendations
process: Assessment of current performance and scale buildup
Clear quote and explanation of the process
Thorough descaling with proper chemicals and technique
Final performance check and walkthrough
services.pricingNote: Most tankless descaling services range from $275–$450. Written estimate provided before starting.
